## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî refactoring without behavior change
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî adding or updating tests
- [ ] `build` / `ci` ‚Äî tooling, CI/CD
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project conventions (ESLint + Prettier)
- [ ] I have added / updated the necessary tests
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes without errors
- [ ] `npm run test` passes without errors
- [ ] `npm run build` passes without errors
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if needed
